## Bullish Positioning and Trader Sentiment Re-Engaging With Meta

Sentiment re-engagement can be a lagging indicator of fundamentals already in motion; thin informational content on its own, but worth reading alongside Meta's data center and AI pricing news today as context for momentum.

- Traders are described as re-engaging with META after a period of reduced enthusiasm.
- The headline frames the shift as broad sentiment recovery, with bulls outlining an upside case.
- No new company-specific fundamental catalyst is disclosed.
